messages: {"parts":[{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{\"cmd\": \"python3 << 'EOF'\\nimport ast\\nimport re\\n\\n# Read the full response file\\nwith open('/home/.z/workspaces/con_YMUPUjIsMLKFyi10/app_responses/google_drive~~3ause_app_google_drive_core.txt', 'r') as f:\\n    content = f.read()\\n\\n# Find the Python list/dict structure after 'ret='\\nmatch = re.search(r\\\"ret=(\\\\[.*?\\\\])\\\\s+stash_id=\\\", content, re.DOTALL)\\nif match:\\n    files_str = match.group(1)\\n    # Use ast.literal_eval for Python-style dict literals\\n    files = ast.literal_eval(files_str)\\n    \\n    for file in files:\\n        name = file.get('name', 'Unknown')\\n        file_id = file.get('id', 'Unknown')\\n        mime_type = file.get('mimeType', 'Unknown')\\n        print(f\\\"- {name} (ID: {file_id}, Type: {mime_type})\\\")\\n    \\n    print(f\\\"\\\\n\\\\nTotal files: {len(files)}\\\")\\nelse:\\n    print(\\\"Could not parse file list\\\")\\nEOF\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01DxfwRQAFXWJqErA5QDAMn7","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":61362,"cache_write_tokens":627,"cache_read_tokens":60735,"output_tokens":349,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":627,"cache_read_input_tokens":60735,"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":349}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T00:07:18.098896Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01Y78Hjrk8zSqQ9ZiZZQkK3r","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"62427c1e-2871-4e7f-bd7b-76443dba7462","metadata":null}
